items.title: Bishops Call On Notre Dame To Rescind Pro-Abortion Professor’s Appointment To Leadership
items.description: The appointment is merely the latest attack on the Catholic identity of Notre Dame in recent years.

items.title: Conservatives Can’t Beat Democrats Until They Defeat The RINOs In Their Own Party First
items.description: Until conservatives root out the rot within their own party, the D.C. status quo will continue to remain the same.

items.title: The Doorbell Camera Surveillance State Is Not Just About Finding Fido And Grandma
items.description: The mass surveillance state is quite literally on your doorstep in the form of a big-tech owned doorbell camera.

items.title: Politico: Judges Use ‘Workarounds’ To ‘Bypass’ Pro-Trump Rulings On Immigration
items.description: The judges highlighted by Politico are not outliers, in fact, they are emblematic of an activist judiciary that defies constitutional limits.

items.title: Why Election Crimes Are Rarely Prosecuted In Georgia
items.description: The structural dysfunction of state offices in enforcing Georgia's election law has too often led to flagrant disregard of those laws.
